title: Medical Billing Services
heroDescription: End-to-end medical billing that delivers clean claims, faster reimbursements, and clear financial visibility for your practice.

overview.title: Billing built for clean claims and reliable cash flow
overview.body: Our medical billing teams manage the full claim lifecycle with specialty-aware workflows, payer-specific edits, and continuous QA. We take on the administrative load so your staff can focus on patient care while we optimize reimbursements.
bullets: Specialty-specific claim rules and modifier checks
Real-time eligibility, authorization, and charge capture support
Claim scrubbing to reduce preventable denials
Transparent monthly reporting and payer trend insights

outcomes.title: Higher first-pass acceptance
outcomes.description: Cleaner claims and payer-ready documentation reduce rework and resubmissions.

outcomes.title: Faster reimbursements
outcomes.description: Optimized submission cadence and follow-up cycles shorten the time to payment.

outcomes.title: Stronger revenue integrity
outcomes.description: Consistent charge capture and reconciliation protect against leakage.

deliverables.title: Charge capture review
deliverables.description: Validate encounter data and missing charges before claims go out.

deliverables.title: Claim scrubbing and edits
deliverables.description: Automated and manual edits to ensure payer compliance.

deliverables.title: ERA/EOB posting
deliverables.description: Accurate payment posting with contractual adjustments applied.

deliverables.title: Patient balance workflows
deliverables.description: Clear statements and follow-up to improve patient collections.

deliverables.title: Monthly KPI reporting
deliverables.description: Dashboards covering AR, denial rates, and payer performance.

process.title: Discovery and data review
process.description: Assess current workflows, payer mix, and system integrations.

process.title: Workflow design
process.description: Configure claim rules, charge capture steps, and reporting cadence.

process.title: Go-live and stabilization
process.description: Launch with QA monitoring and rapid issue resolution.

process.title: Continuous optimization
process.description: Monthly performance reviews and denial-prevention tuning.

faqs.question: Can you work with our existing EHR and PM system?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support major EHR/PM platforms and can integrate with your current workflow.

faqs.question: How quickly can we see improvements in collections?
faqs.answer: Many practices see measurable improvements within the first 60 to 90 days after go-live.

faqs.question: Do you support multi-location practices?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manage provider and location-specific billing rules with consolidated reporting.

title: Revenue Cycle Management
heroDescription: Comprehensive revenue cycle management that connects intake, coding, billing, and collections into one accountable process.

overview.title: One coordinated RCM engine for your practice
overview.body: We unify front-end, mid-cycle, and back-end workflows so every claim moves faster and cleaner from appointment to payment. You gain a single partner accountable for financial performance.
bullets: Front-desk training for accurate intake and eligibility
Coding QA and documentation integrity checks
Denial prevention and appeal escalation paths
AR segmentation and targeted payer follow-up

outcomes.title: Shorter AR days
outcomes.description: Streamlined workflows reduce delays across the revenue cycle.

outcomes.title: Predictable cash flow
outcomes.description: Improved claim accuracy and faster resolution cycles stabilize revenue.

outcomes.title: Operational clarity
outcomes.description: Unified KPIs and dashboards reveal what drives performance.

deliverables.title: End-to-end RCM oversight
deliverables.description: Full lifecycle management from intake to collections.

deliverables.title: Eligibility and authorization
deliverables.description: Upfront verification and guidance to prevent denials.

deliverables.title: Coding and charge QA
deliverables.description: Specialty-aware coding audits and pre-bill review.

deliverables.title: Denial and underpayment management
deliverables.description: Root-cause analysis, appeals, and recovery workflows.

deliverables.title: Performance reporting
deliverables.description: Role-based dashboards for providers and leadership.

process.title: RCM assessment
process.description: Audit your current workflow, KPIs, and payer performance.

process.title: Workflow alignment
process.description: Define responsibilities, SOPs, and integration points.

process.title: Execution and monitoring
process.description: Daily production with real-time quality checks.

process.title: Optimization cadence
process.description: Monthly and quarterly reviews to keep improving results.

faqs.question: What is included in full RCM coverage?
faqs.answer: We manage eligibility, coding QA, claim submission, payments, denials, and reporting.

faqs.question: Can we keep some functions in-house?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can co-manage RCM or provide modular support based on your needs.

faqs.question: How do you track performance?
faqs.answer: We provide KPI dashboards covering AR aging, denial trends, and payer turnaround times.

title: Medical Coding Services
heroDescription: Certified coding support that improves accuracy, reduces audit risk, and protects reimbursement.

overview.title: Coding accuracy that stands up to audits
overview.body: Our certified coders apply specialty-specific CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS rules with documentation-driven validation. We reduce risk and improve revenue integrity for every encounter.
bullets: Modifier validation and medical necessity checks
Provider queries and documentation feedback loops
Pre-bill audits to prevent compliance issues

outcomes.title: Improved reimbursement accuracy
outcomes.description: Correct code selection and modifier use reduces underpayment.

outcomes.title: Lower audit risk
outcomes.description: Documentation-driven coding reduces compliance exposure.

outcomes.title: Faster claim approvals
outcomes.description: Cleaner coding leads to fewer edits and denials.

deliverables.title: CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding
deliverables.description: Accurate code assignment aligned with payer policies.

deliverables.title: Modifier and bundling review
deliverables.description: Reduce errors with robust modifier logic.

deliverables.title: Documentation feedback
deliverables.description: Provider queries that strengthen documentation quality.

deliverables.title: Coding audits

deliverables.title: Specialty-specific code updates
deliverables.description: Stay current with annual code and guideline changes.

faqs.question: Do you support both professional and facility coding?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide support for professional, facility, and ASC coding needs.

faqs.answer: We issue provider queries with clear guidance and track resolution.

faqs.answer: Yes. We can run targeted or comprehensive coding audits.

title: Provider Credentialing

overview.title: Faster credentialing with full visibility

outcomes.title: Reduced revenue delays

title: Eligibility Verification
heroDescription: Verify coverage and benefits before each visit to reduce denials and improve patient collections.

overview.title: Upfront verification that prevents downstream denials
overview.body: We confirm active coverage, benefits, and authorization requirements before services are delivered. That means fewer claim rejections and clearer patient responsibility.

outcomes.title: Fewer eligibility denials
outcomes.description: Upfront checks reduce avoidable claim rejections.

outcomes.title: Improved patient collections
outcomes.description: Clear financial responsibility improves point-of-service payments.

outcomes.title: Smoother front desk workflow
outcomes.description: Standardized scripts and checklists reduce errors.

deliverables.title: Eligibility confirmation
deliverables.description: Coverage status verified prior to service.

deliverables.title: Benefit breakdown
deliverables.description: Copays, deductibles, and coinsurance documented.

deliverables.title: Authorization guidance
deliverables.description: Identify when pre-authorization is required.

deliverables.title: Patient estimate support
deliverables.description: Estimate tools and scripts for front desk teams.

deliverables.title: Verification logs
deliverables.description: Detailed records for compliance and audit needs.

process.title: Collect demographics
process.description: Validate patient and insurance details.

process.title: Verify coverage
process.description: Confirm active policy and effective dates.

process.title: Confirm benefits
process.description: Document copays, deductibles, and limits.

process.title: Communicate findings
process.description: Notify staff of issues before the visit.

faqs.question: How often should eligibility be checked?
faqs.answer: We recommend verification for every visit, especially for recurring services.

faqs.question: Do you handle authorizations too?
faqs.answer: We flag authorization requirements and help the team initiate requests.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our scheduling system?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can align verification workflows with your scheduling and intake process.

title: Denial Management
heroDescription: Recover lost revenue and reduce recurring denials with a structured appeal and prevention program.

overview.title: Turn denials into recoverable revenue
overview.body: We analyze denial patterns, correct root causes, and appeal aggressively within payer timelines. Our goal is to recover revenue now and prevent it from slipping again.
bullets: Appeal letter drafting and submission tracking

outcomes.title: Higher recovery rates
outcomes.description: Appeals are filed with complete documentation and follow-through.

outcomes.title: Lower repeat denials
outcomes.description: We fix the upstream issues that trigger rejections.

outcomes.title: Cleaner claims pipeline
outcomes.description: Front-end edits reduce denial volume over time.

deliverables.title: Denial inventory
deliverables.description: Centralized list of denied claims with categorization.

deliverables.title: Appeal preparation

deliverables.title: Payer follow-up

deliverables.title: Denial trend reports

deliverables.title: Prevention roadmap
deliverables.description: Action plan to reduce future denials.

process.title: Analyze and categorize
process.description: Group denials by root cause and payer.

process.title: Correct and resubmit

process.title: Appeal and follow up
process.description: Track response times and escalate when necessary.

process.title: Prevent recurrence
process.description: Update workflows and payer rules.

faqs.question: How quickly are denials worked?
faqs.answer: We prioritize high-value claims and adhere to payer appeal timelines.

faqs.question: Do you appeal medical necessity denials?

faqs.question: Will you share denial trends with our team?

outcomes.title: Lower AR days

outcomes.title: Recovered underpayments

outcomes.title: Cleaner AR inventory

process.title: Report and optimize
process.description: Track progress and refine workflows monthly.

faqs.answer: We prioritize claims near payer filing deadlines and high-value balances.

title: Payment Posting
heroDescription: Accurate payment posting and reconciliation that keeps your books clean and reports reliable.

overview.title: Precision posting for trustworthy financial reporting
overview.body: We post ERAs and EOBs with exact contractual adjustments, maintain deposit logs, and reconcile batches so you always know what was paid, adjusted, or denied.

outcomes.title: Accurate ledgers
outcomes.description: Clean postings improve AR visibility and reconciliation.

outcomes.title: Faster secondary billing
outcomes.description: Crossover rules reduce time to secondary payment.

outcomes.title: Reduced write-off errors
outcomes.description: Clear contractual rules prevent revenue leakage.

deliverables.title: ERA/EOB processing
deliverables.description: Detailed posting with adjustments and remarks.

deliverables.title: Deposit reconciliation
deliverables.description: Match deposits to posted batches.

deliverables.title: Secondary claim triggers
deliverables.description: Prompt next-payer submissions.

deliverables.title: Denial identification
deliverables.description: Route denials to the correct workflow.

deliverables.title: Posting accuracy audits
deliverables.description: Periodic QA to ensure consistent posting.

process.title: Receive remits
process.description: Collect ERAs, EOBs, and bank deposits.

process.title: Post and adjust
process.description: Apply payments, contractuals, and remarks.

process.title: Reconcile batches
process.description: Match posted totals to deposit records.

process.title: Route follow-up items
process.description: Send denials and underpayments for action.

faqs.question: Do you handle both electronic and paper remits?
faqs.answer: Yes. We post ERAs and manual EOBs with full reconciliation.

faqs.answer: We use standardized workflows, double checks, and periodic audits.

faqs.question: Can you manage secondary billing triggers?
faqs.answer: Yes. We apply coordination rules to ensure timely secondary claims.
